_comment: Append-only (frozen L0 spec 03 §3.7). Tombstone = retired/renamed name (may carry renamed_to, one deprecation window). Ban = permanent deny, no successor (common-word trigger blocklist lands at Stage-2, stored kind=command origin=ban). The bare ActionSpec STRING ban lives here; the class ActionSpec SYMBOL ban lives in tools/check_symbol_shadowing.py (the two-mechanism boundary, design-spec §3.5 — neither subsumes the other).
